page: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an instance in the LSv3 family, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, featuring 24 physical cores and 48 vCPUs via Hyper-Threading. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per physical core. A key feature of this instance is its massive bundled local storage capacity of 12,012 GB, which is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark data indicates strong performance in data-intensive operations. The instance achieved a PassMark CPU score of 48,928.12 and a PassMark memory score of 2,908.37, both placing in the top 25% tier. Database operations on PassMark scored 21,582.45, also in the top 25%. In single-threaded and multi-threaded tasks, the server demonstrates average tier performance, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 15,837.0 and a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 46,634.45. Memory bandwidth reaches up to 2,520.89 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 163.76 GB/sec for uncached large blocks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the L48s_v3 offers high resource density by bundling 12 TB of local storage directly with 384 GB of RAM, reducing the need for external storage attachments for large datasets. However, the lack of a dedicated GPU limits its utility for hardware-accelerated deep learning, though it achieves a strong 282.26 tokens/sec in small-model LLM text generation. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale database deployments, big data analytics, and memory-intensive transactional workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server from the LSv3 family, featuring a dedicated 2.8 GHz Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 24 physical cores and 48 vCPUs. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM and a substantial 12,012 GB of bundled local storage. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates strong capabilities, scoring in the top 25% for PassMark database operations (21,582.45) and PassMark memory performance (2,908.37). While it lacks GPU acceleration, its high local storage capacity and 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provide excellent resource density for data-intensive applications. This server is designed for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and memory-intensive transactional workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an LSv3-family server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12 TB of local storage, delivering top-tier database and memory performance for data-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 features 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12 TB local storage, delivering strong database and memory benchmark performance.
tagline: A high-density storage and memory-optimized instance featuring twelve terabytes of local capacity and forty-eight virtual cores for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores
384 GB of system memory providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
12,012 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier PassMark database and memory benchmark performance
Optimized for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and transactional workloads
